policy.note: This brief summarizes an existing review pack. It does not approve public display, mutate manifests, upload assets or copy source bodies.

candidate_items.rights_basis: Exact hash/byte match to Wikimedia Commons CC0 file.
conditions_to_confirm: Confirm local file is still the exact Wikimedia original.
Confirm CC0 page state before public display.
Decide whether voluntary attribution should be displayed.

candidate_items.rights_basis: Exact hash/byte match to Library of Congress digital file with no-known-restrictions advisory.
conditions_to_confirm: Review LOC rights advisory and Balthazar Korab collection restrictions.
Decide whether no-known-restrictions is acceptable for the public site.
Use LOC attribution and reproduction number if displayed.

candidate_items.rights_basis: Exact hash/byte match to Wikimedia Commons file reviewed from Flickr under CC BY-SA 2.0.
conditions_to_confirm: Confirm no local modifications or record changes.
Confirm CC BY-SA 2.0 compatibility with public display context.
Display author, source link, license link and change notice.

blocked_items.rights_basis: Likely derived from LOC full image, but not an exact remote match.
conditions_to_confirm: Confirm crop generation source and transformation.
Decide whether to replace with exact LOC full file instead of crop.
Keep blocked until derivative review is complete.

blocked_items.rights_basis: No file-level source or own-work build log identified.
conditions_to_confirm: Determine whether the SVG is an own analytical reconstruction.
Record geometry/source basis and author.
If derived from protected plan, keep private/review-only.

blocked_items.rights_basis: No file-level source or own-work build log identified.
conditions_to_confirm: Determine whether the SVG is an own analytical reconstruction.
Record geometry/source basis and author.
If derived from protected section, keep private/review-only.
Attach model generation script or build log.
Record source basis for dimensions and geometry.
Separate own massing from plan-derived geometry.

next_actions: Use this brief for a later owner/source-rights review conversation, not as approval.
Keep all four derived or unmatched Villa files blocked until source-basis/build-log review exists.
If any candidate is accepted later, create a separate manifest change and rerun file provenance, rights candidate and data-lane sweep checks.
